footer.description: Everpay is a leading payment processing company providing secure and efficient solutions for businesses worldwide.

home.heroTitle: The Payment Infrastructure for the Internet
home.heroDescription: Millions of businesses of all sizes—from startups to large enterprises—use Everpay's software and APIs to accept payments, send payouts, and manage their businesses online.
home.feature1Description: Accept payments from customers worldwide with support for over 135 currencies.
home.feature2Description: Protect your business and customers with industry-leading fraud prevention and compliance.
home.feature3Description: Integrate easily with our developer-friendly APIs and comprehensive documentation.
home.ctaDescription: Join thousands of businesses already using Everpay to simplify their payment processing.

overviewContent.title: Simplify Your Payment Processing
overviewContent.description: Everpay provides a comprehensive suite of payment solutions designed to help businesses of all sizes accept, process, and manage payments efficiently and securely.

featuresContent.title: Powerful Features for Every Need
featuresContent.description: Our payment platform is built with flexibility and scalability in mind, offering a wide range of features to support your unique business requirements.
featuresContent.feature1Description: Design a checkout experience that matches your brand and optimizes conversion rates.
featuresContent.feature2Description: Automate subscriptions and recurring payments with flexible billing cycles.
featuresContent.feature3Description: Accept payments securely at your physical locations with our POS solutions.
featuresContent.feature4Description: Streamline the process of managing chargebacks and disputes.
featuresContent.feature5Description: Securely store customer card details for future transactions without exposing sensitive data.

pricingContent.title: Transparent Pricing, No Hidden Fees
pricingContent.description: Everpay offers competitive and straightforward pricing models tailored to your business volume and needs. Contact our sales team for a custom quote.
pricingContent.customPricingDescription: Businesses with high transaction volumes or unique requirements can benefit from custom pricing plans. Contact our sales team to discuss your needs.

onlinePayments.title: Online Payments
onlinePayments.heroDescription: Everpay's online payment solutions make it easy for your customers to pay, no matter where they are or what device they're using.
onlinePayments.feature1Description: Embed secure, customizable payment forms directly into your website or app.
onlinePayments.feature2Description: Ensure a smooth payment experience on any mobile device.
onlinePayments.feature3Description: Advanced tools to detect and prevent fraudulent online transactions.
onlinePayments.feature4Description: Support for credit cards, digital wallets, and local payment options worldwide.
onlinePayments.ctaTitle: Ready to boost your online sales?
onlinePayments.ctaDescription: Start accepting online payments with Everpay today.

commerce.title: Commerce Solutions
commerce.heroDescription: Everpay's commerce solutions bring together online and in-person payments, inventory, and customer data for a truly unified experience.
commerce.feature1Description: Seamlessly connect your online store with your physical retail locations.
commerce.feature2Description: Keep track of your products across all sales channels in real-time.
commerce.feature3Description: Gain a 360-degree view of your customers, their purchase history, and preferences.
commerce.feature4Description: Access comprehensive reports to make informed business decisions.
commerce.ctaTitle: Transform your business with unified commerce.
commerce.ctaDescription: Discover how Everpay can streamline your operations.

fraudPrevention.title: Fraud Prevention
fraudPrevention.heroDescription: Everpay's advanced fraud prevention tools use machine learning and real-time analysis to minimize risk and maximize legitimate transactions.
fraudPrevention.feature1Description: Automatically detect and block suspicious transactions based on behavioral patterns.
fraudPrevention.feature2Description: Set up your own rules and thresholds to flag high-risk transactions.
fraudPrevention.feature3Description: Reduce chargebacks and associated costs with our dispute management tools.
fraudPrevention.feature4Description: Identify and block fraudsters by analyzing device characteristics.
fraudPrevention.ctaTitle: Secure your revenue with Everpay's fraud prevention.
fraudPrevention.ctaDescription: Protect your business from evolving threats.

cardIssuing.title: Card Issuing
cardIssuing.heroTitle: Issue Your Own Cards with Everpay
cardIssuing.heroDescription: Create, manage, and distribute physical and virtual cards programmatically with Everpay's card issuing platform.
cardIssuing.feature1Description: Design cards with your brand, set spending limits, and control usage.
cardIssuing.feature2Description: Approve or decline transactions in real-time based on your business logic.
cardIssuing.feature3Description: Issue cards for various use cases, from employee expenses to customer rewards.
cardIssuing.feature4Description: Track card usage, spending, and balances with comprehensive reports.
cardIssuing.ctaTitle: Ready to take control of your spending?

posSystems.title: POS Systems
posSystems.heroTitle: Modern POS Systems for Seamless Retail
posSystems.heroDescription: Everpay's point-of-sale (POS) systems are designed for modern retail, offering fast, secure, and integrated payment processing.
posSystems.feature1Description: Process credit cards, debit cards, mobile payments, and more.
posSystems.feature2Description: Automatically update inventory across online and in-store channels.
posSystems.feature3Description: Build customer profiles and track purchase history for personalized service.
posSystems.feature4Description: Gain insights into sales performance and customer behavior.

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.heroDescription: Access comprehensive guides, API references, and SDKs to integrate Everpay into your applications.

sections.title: Getting Started
sections.description: Learn how to set up your Everpay account and make your first API call.

sections.title: API Reference
sections.description: Detailed documentation for all Everpay API endpoints and resources.

sections.title: SDKs & Libraries
sections.description: Explore our official SDKs for various programming languages.

sections.title: Webhooks
sections.description: Understand how to use webhooks to receive real-time notifications.

sections.title: Testing
sections.description: Learn about testing your integration in sandbox and production environments.

helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.heroDescription: Find answers to common questions, troubleshoot issues, and get support from the Everpay team.

categories.title: Getting Started

categories.title: Payments & Transactions
categories.description: Information on processing payments, refunds, and disputes.

categories.title: Account Management
categories.description: Manage your account settings, users, and billing.

categories.title: Integrations
categories.description: Connect Everpay with your e-commerce platforms and apps.

categories.title: Security & Compliance
categories.description: Learn about our security measures and compliance standards.

helpCenter.contactSupport: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.heroDescription: At Everpay, we believe in empowering businesses with seamless and secure payment solutions. Our mission is to build the financial infrastructure for the internet.
aboutUs.ourStoryDescription: Founded in 20XX, Everpay started with a vision to simplify online payments. We've grown into a global leader, serving millions of businesses worldwide.
aboutUs.value1Description: We prioritize our customers' success and strive to exceed their expectations.
aboutUs.value2Description: We constantly innovate to provide cutting-edge payment technology.
aboutUs.value3Description: We operate with transparency, honesty, and ethical practices.
aboutUs.value4Description: We aim to make a positive impact on businesses and economies worldwide.
aboutUs.teamDescription: Our diverse team of experts is dedicated to building the future of payments.
aboutUs.ctaDescription: Explore career opportunities and become a part of the Everpay team.

careers.title: Careers
careers.heroDescription: We're building the future of payments, and we're looking for talented individuals to join us. Explore our open positions and grow your career with Everpay.
careers.reason1Description: Contribute to a platform that empowers millions of businesses globally.
careers.reason2Description: Access continuous learning and career development programs.
careers.reason3Description: Work in a diverse and supportive environment where your ideas are valued.
careers.reason4Description: Enjoy comprehensive health, wellness, and financial benefits.
careers.openPositionsDescription: Browse our current job openings across various departments.
careers.ctaDescription: Apply for a position at Everpay today.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.heroDescription: Have questions or need support? Reach out to our team, and we'll be happy to assist you.
contact.salesDescription: Interested in Everpay for your business? Our sales team can help.
contact.supportDescription: Need help with your existing Everpay account? Visit our Help Center or contact support.
contact.generalInquiriesDescription: For all other questions, please use the form below or email us.

partners.title: Partners
partners.heroDescription: Join the Everpay Partner Program and grow your business by offering our leading payment solutions to your clients.
partners.reason1Description: Provide comprehensive payment solutions to your customers.
partners.reason2Description: Earn competitive commissions on referred businesses.
partners.reason3Description: Receive dedicated support and resources from our partner team.
partners.reason4Description: Access co-marketing materials and sales enablement tools.
partners.type1Description: Refer businesses to Everpay and earn commissions.
partners.type2Description: Integrate Everpay into your platform or software.
partners.type3Description: Sell Everpay solutions directly to your clients.
partners.ctaDescription: Apply to become an Everpay partner today.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.heroDescription: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, make a purchase, or contact us. This may include your name, email address, payment information, and other details. We also collect information automatically when you use our services, such as IP address, device information, and usage data.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process transactions, communicate with you, personalize your experience, and for security and fraud prevention. We may also use your information for marketing purposes, with your consent where required.

sections.title: How We Share Your Information
sections.content: We may share your information with third-party service providers who perform services on our behalf, such as payment processors, analytics providers, and marketing partners. We may also share information with law enforcement or other government agencies if required by law or to protect our rights.

sections.title: Your Choices
sections.content: You have certain choices regarding your personal information, such as accessing, updating, or deleting your data. You may also opt-out of receiving promotional communications from us. Please note that some information may be retained for legal or business purposes.

sections.title: Security
sections.content: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure.

sections.title: Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.heroDescription: These terms govern your use of Everpay's services. By using our services, you agree to these terms.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using the services provided by Everpay, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all terms incorporated by reference. If you do not agree to all of these terms, do not use our services.

sections.title: Eligibility
sections.content: You must be at least 18 years old to use our services. By using our services, you represent and warrant that you meet this age requirement and have the legal capacity to enter into these terms.

sections.title: Account Registration
sections.content: To access certain features of our services, you may be required to register for an account. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during the registration process and to update such information to keep it accurate, current, and complete.

sections.title: User Conduct
sections.content: You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of, restrict, or inhibit anyone else's use and enjoyment of the services. Prohibited behavior includes harassing or causing distress or inconvenience to any other user, transmitting obscene or offensive content, or disrupting the normal flow of dialogue within our services.

sections.title: Fees and Payments
sections.content: You agree to pay all fees and charges associated with your use of the services as described on our pricing page or as otherwise agreed upon. All fees are non-refundable unless otherwise stated.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content and materials available on our services, including but not limited to text, graphics, website name, code, images, and logos are the intellectual property of Everpay and are protected by applicable copyright and trademark law.

sections.title: Termination
sections.content: We may terminate or suspend your access to our services immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms of Service.

sections.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.content: Our services are provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis without any warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including, but not limited to, implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: In no event shall Everpay, nor its directors, employees, partners, agents, suppliers, or affiliates, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from (i) your access to or use of or inability to access or use the Service; (ii) any conduct or content of any third party on the Service; (iii) any content obtained from the Service; and (iv) unauthorized access, use or alteration of your transmissions or content, whether based on warranty, contract, tort (including negligence) or any other legal theory, whether or not we have been informed of the possibility of such damage, and even if a remedy set forth herein is found to have failed of its essential purpose.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of [Your Country/State], without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.heroDescription: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are, how we use them, and your choices regarding cookies.

sections.title: What are Cookies?
sections.content: Cookies are small pieces of text sent by your web browser by a website you visit. A cookie file is stored in your web browser and allows the Service or a third-party to recognize you and make your next visit easier and the Service more useful to you.

sections.title: How We Use Cookies
sections.content: When you use and access the Service, we may place a number of cookies files in your web browser. We use cookies for the following purposes: to enable certain functions of the Service, to provide analytics, to store your preferences, to enable advertisements delivery, including behavioral advertising.

sections.title: Third-party Cookies
sections.content: In addition to our own cookies, we may also use various third-parties cookies to report usage statistics of the Service, deliver advertisements on and through the Service, and so on.

sections.title: What are your choices regarding cookies?
sections.content: If you'd like to delete cookies or instruct your web browser to delete or refuse cookies, please visit the help pages of your web browser. Please note, however, that if you delete cookies or refuse to accept them, you might not be able to use all of the features we offer, you may not be able to store your preferences, and some of our pages might not display properly.

business.title: Business Solutions
business.heroTitle: Tailored Payment Solutions for Your Business
business.heroDescription: Everpay offers a range of flexible payment solutions designed to meet the unique needs of businesses across various industries.
business.feature1Description: Integrate Everpay seamlessly with your existing business systems and workflows.
business.feature2Description: Our platform scales with your business, handling any volume of transactions.
business.feature3Description: Receive personalized support from our team of payment experts.
business.feature4Description: Accept payments from customers worldwide with multi-currency support.
business.ctaTitle: Ready to optimize your business payments?
business.ctaDescription: Discover how Everpay can streamline your financial operations.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Solutions
ecommerce.heroTitle: Boost Your Online Sales with Seamless Payments
ecommerce.heroDescription: Everpay's e-commerce solutions provide everything you need to accept payments online, securely and efficiently, driving higher conversion rates.
ecommerce.feature1Description: Reduce cart abandonment with a fast, intuitive, and mobile-friendly checkout experience.
ecommerce.feature2Description: Easily manage recurring payments for subscription-based businesses.
ecommerce.feature3Description: Protect your e-commerce business from online fraud with advanced detection tools.
ecommerce.feature4Description: Connect seamlessly with Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, and more.
ecommerce.ctaTitle: Transform your online store's payment experience.
ecommerce.ctaDescription: Start selling more with Everpay's e-commerce solutions.

marketplace.title: Marketplace Solutions
marketplace.heroDescription: Everpay's marketplace solutions handle complex payment flows, enabling you to easily manage payments between buyers, sellers, and your platform.
marketplace.feature1Description: Automatically split payments between multiple vendors and your platform.
marketplace.feature2Description: Streamline the onboarding and verification process for new sellers.
marketplace.feature3Description: Automate payouts to your vendors in multiple currencies.
marketplace.feature4Description: Tools to help manage and resolve disputes between buyers and sellers.
marketplace.ctaTitle: Build a thriving marketplace with Everpay.
marketplace.ctaDescription: Simplify your payment operations and focus on growth.

retail.title: Retail Solutions
retail.heroTitle: Modern Payment Solutions for Retail Businesses
retail.heroDescription: Everpay's retail solutions provide fast, secure, and integrated payment processing for your physical stores, enhancing the customer experience.
retail.feature1Description: Connect your in-store payments with your inventory and customer data.
retail.feature2Description: Accept tap-to-pay, mobile wallets, and other modern payment methods.
retail.feature3Description: Continue accepting payments even when your internet connection is down.
retail.feature4Description: Integrate with loyalty programs to reward your customers.
